strategy: PING frame flush after block response write (TLS buffer force flush) + is_http2=2

comparison_with_gamma_build10.gamma_result: PING flush WORKED - SSE body delivered with warning text
comparison_with_gamma_build10.copilot_result: PING flush NOT effective - response data still empty
comparison_with_gamma_build10.difference: Copilot uses is_http2=2 which may handle PING frames differently than standard SSE

diagnosis.root_cause: is_http2=2 mode returns 200 OK but PING flush does not force SSE data delivery for Copilot
possible_reasons: is_http2=2 may close the stream before PING flush reaches the client
Copilot's SSE parser may not process data that arrives after stream reset
PING flush may work at TLS level but HTTP/2 framing prevents data frame delivery
action_needed: Copilot needs different approach than PING flush
Option B: Try is_http2=1 instead of is_http2=2 to use GOAWAY+END_STREAM
Option C: Return non-200 status to trigger Copilot error handling
